mapper.insert: INSERT INTO health_record (pet_id, temperature, weight, appetite, spirit, check_date) VALUES (#{petId}, #{temperature}, #{weight}, #{appetite}, #{spirit}, #{checkDate})
mapper.select: SELECT id, pet_id, temperature, weight, appetite, spirit, check_date FROM health_record WHERE pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY check_date DESC
SELECT id, pet_id, temperature, weight, appetite, spirit, check_date FROM health_record WHERE pet_id = #{petId} ORDER BY check_date DESC LIMIT 1
